# Figure 3: Biology of dominant pathways and squared deviation of dominant vs. non-dominant pathways
# last modified: 01/30/26
# author: Kewalin Samart

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(clusterProfiler)
library(GOSemSim)
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
```

```{r}
summary_path = "figures/figure2/metadata_annotation/annotation_table.tsv"
summary_df = read_tsv(here(summary_path)) 

# read in upregulated microarray-RNAseq pathway matrix (data for figure 2a)
up_pathway_df = read_tsv(here("figures/figure2/figure2a/marray_rnaseq_asinh_up_pathways.tsv"))
pathways = up_pathway_df$Description
up_pathway_df$Description = NULL

# microarray upregulated signatures
microarray_cols <- colnames(up_pathway_df)[colnames(up_pathway_df) %in% summary_df$SIGNATURE_NAME[summary_df$technology == "microarray" &                                                                               summary_df$signature_ID != "aggregated_microarray"]]
# get pathways (row names) that are enriched (cell != 0) in at least 90% of the signatures in the following matrix
up_micro_mat <- as.matrix(up_pathway_df[, microarray_cols, drop = FALSE])
row.names(up_micro_mat) = pathways
# ensure numeric
storage.mode(up_micro_mat) <- "numeric"
# proportion of non-zero entries per pathway (row)
prop_nonzero <- rowMeans(up_micro_mat != 0, na.rm = TRUE)
# pathways enriched in at least 90% of signatures
up_micro_dominant_pathways <- rownames(up_micro_mat)[prop_nonzero >= 0.9]
          
# microarray upregulated signatures          
rnaseq_cols <- colnames(up_pathway_df)[colnames(up_pathway_df) %in% summary_df$SIGNATURE_NAME[summary_df$technology == "RNAseq" & 
                                                                                summary_df$signature_ID != "aggregated_RNAseq"]]
# get pathways (row names) that are enriched (cell != 0) in at least 90% of the signatures in the following matrix
up_rnaseq_mat <- as.matrix(up_pathway_df[, rnaseq_cols, drop = FALSE])
row.names(up_rnaseq_mat) = pathways
# ensure numeric
storage.mode(up_rnaseq_mat) <- "numeric"
# proportion of non-zero entries per pathway (row)
prop_nonzero <- rowMeans(up_rnaseq_mat != 0, na.rm = TRUE)
# pathways enriched in at least 90% of signatures
up_rnaseq_dominant_pathways <- rownames(up_rnaseq_mat)[prop_nonzero >= 0.9]

up_dominant_pathways = intersect(up_micro_dominant_pathways, up_rnaseq_dominant_pathways)

# read in downregulated microarray-RNAseq pathway matrix (data for figure 2b)


```

```{r}
library(GO.db)
library(AnnotationDbi)

go_descriptions <- unique(up_dominant_pathways) 

# Map TERM → GOID
term2go <- AnnotationDbi::select(
  GO.db,
  keys = go_descriptions,
  columns = c("GOID", "TERM", "ONTOLOGY"),
  keytype = "TERM"
)

# Keep only Biological Process (usually what you want)
term2go <- term2go[term2go$ONTOLOGY == "BP", ]

# Drop unmatched terms
term2go <- term2go[!is.na(term2go$GOID), ]


library(GO.db)
library(AnnotationDbi)

bp_parents <- AnnotationDbi::as.list(GO.db::GOBPPARENTS)
get_parents <- function(go_id) {
  unique(bp_parents[[go_id]])
}
parent_map <- lapply(term2go$GOID, get_parents)

# drop empty mappings
parent_map <- parent_map[!sapply(parent_map, is.null)]
parent_counts <- sort(table(unlist(parent_map)), decreasing = TRUE)

parent_df <- data.frame(
  GOID = names(parent_counts),
  count = as.integer(parent_counts)
)

parent_df <- merge(
  parent_df,
  AnnotationDbi::select(
    GO.db,
    keys = parent_df$GOID,
    columns = "TERM",
    keytype = "GOID"
  ),
  by = "GOID"
)

parent_df <- parent_df[order(-parent_df$count), ]

```

```{r}
library(org.Hs.eg.db)
library(AnnotationDbi)

# GO → gene mapping
go2gene <- AnnotationDbi::select(
  org.Hs.eg.db,
  keys = parent_df$GOID,
  columns = "ENTREZID",
  keytype = "GOALL"
)

# remove NAs
go2gene <- go2gene[!is.na(go2gene$ENTREZID), ]

# gene counts per GO term
gene_counts <- as.data.frame(table(go2gene$GOALL))
colnames(gene_counts) <- c("GOID", "n_genes")

parent_df <- merge(
  parent_df,
  gene_counts,
  by = "GOID",
  all.x = TRUE
)

# GO terms with zero mapped genes → drop
parent_df$n_genes[is.na(parent_df$n_genes)] <- 0

parent_df_filt <- subset(
  parent_df,
  n_genes >= 5 & n_genes <= 200
)
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(head(parent_df, 20),
       aes(x = reorder(TERM, count), y = count)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#0072B2") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "Parent GO Biological Processes",
    x = "",
    y = "Number of enriched child GO terms"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)

```

```{r}
library(org.Hs.eg.db)
library(AnnotationDbi)
library(dplyr)

keep_go <- parent_df_filt$GOID

go2gene <- AnnotationDbi::select(
  org.Hs.eg.db,
  keys = keep_go,
  columns = "ENTREZID",
  keytype = "GOALL"
)

go2gene <- go2gene %>%
  filter(!is.na(ENTREZID)) %>%
  distinct(GOID = GOALL, ENTREZID)
go_gene_sets <- split(go2gene$ENTREZID, go2gene$GOID)

```

```{r}
go_ids <- names(go_gene_sets)

jaccard <- function(a, b) {
  length(intersect(a, b)) / length(union(a, b))
}

edges <- combn(go_ids, 2, simplify = FALSE, FUN = function(x) {
  g1 <- x[1]; g2 <- x[2]
  inter <- intersect(go_gene_sets[[g1]], go_gene_sets[[g2]])
  
  data.frame(
    from = g1,
    to   = g2,
    overlap = length(inter),
    jaccard = jaccard(go_gene_sets[[g1]], go_gene_sets[[g2]])
  )
})

edges <- bind_rows(edges)

```

```{r}
edges_filt <- edges %>%
  filter(overlap >= 50, jaccard >= 0)


```

```{r}
library(dplyr)

go_similarity <- bind_rows(
  edges_filt %>%
    transmute(
      GOID = from,
      jaccard = jaccard
    ),
  edges_filt %>%
    transmute(
      GOID = to,
      jaccard = jaccard
    )
) %>%
  group_by(GOID) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_jaccard = mean(jaccard),
    n_neighbors  = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

keep_go <- go_similarity %>%
  filter(
    mean_jaccard >= 0.08,
    n_neighbors  >= 2
  ) %>%
  pull(GOID)

edges_core <- edges_filt %>%
  filter(from %in% keep_go & to %in% keep_go)


```

```{r}
set.seed(42)

lay <- layout_with_fr(
  edges_core,
  niter = 2000
)

plot(
  edges_core,
  layout = lay,
  vertex.size = scales::rescale(V(edges_core)$n_genes, c(6, 14)),
  vertex.label = V(edges_core)$TERM,
  vertex.label.cex = 0.5,
  vertex.label.color = "black",
  edge.width = scales::rescale(E(edges_core)$jaccard, c(0.5, 3)),
  edge.color = "grey60"
)




```
